sources.label: Parent behavioral rating scale
sources.content: Parent developmental and behavioral history. Birth: full-term, no complications, no NICU. Early milestones within expected windows. Student is currently 10 years old and in 4th grade after being retained once in 2nd grade. Parent rates inattention/distractibility as severe (6 of 7) at home during homework. Parent reports no known allergies and no daily medications. Sleep is generally adequate. Parent agrees school has provided Tier 2 reading support this year.

sources.label: Teacher behavioral rating scale
sources.content: Grade 4 classroom teacher questionnaire. Student is 10 years old and enrolled in 4th grade; teacher notes prior retention in 2nd grade. Teacher rates inattention/distractibility as mild (2 of 7) during structured class time. Reading fluency remains below grade peers; spelling is weak. Teacher confirms Tier 2 reading support is in place this school year. No behavioral referrals this year. Teacher reports no known allergies observed at school.

sources.label: School cumulative file summary
sources.content: Cumulative file summary prepared for current evaluation. DOB on file matches referral packet. Student is 10 years old and in 4th grade; records confirm retention in 2nd grade. Attendance is regular. Tier 2 reading intervention documented for the current school year. Health card lists no known allergies and no daily medications. No IEP or 504 plan on file.
